context: Tests whether the agent implements email scheduling with correct segments, timing, and subjects; paid social campaigns with correct budgets and audience types; launch analytics with parallel fetching; and email deliverability best practices including domain warm-up and off-peak send timing.

checklist.name: VIP email subject format
checklist.description: VIP early access email subject follows the pattern '[Early Access] {product name} is yours — 24 hours before everyone else'

checklist.name: Public launch email subject
checklist.description: Public launch email subject follows the pattern 'Introducing {product name} — available now'

checklist.name: Non-converters at 72h
checklist.description: Waitlist non-converter follow-up email is scheduled at 72 hours (3 days) AFTER the launch date — not before

checklist.name: Non-converters urgency subject
checklist.description: Waitlist non-converter email subject follows the pattern '{product name} — don't miss out'

checklist.name: Pre-launch retargeting $50/day
checklist.description: Pre-launch retargeting campaign has a budget of $50 per day

checklist.name: Pre-launch audience type
checklist.description: Pre-launch retargeting campaign targets email list and web visitors (combined audience)

checklist.name: Launch day $200/day lookalike
checklist.description: Launch day prospecting campaign has a budget of $200 per day and uses a lookalike audience (1% lookalike of purchasers)

checklist.name: Post-launch DPA $100/day
checklist.description: Post-launch DPA retargeting campaign has a budget of $100 per day and targets product page viewers

checklist.name: Analytics parallel fetch
checklist.description: getLaunchMetrics fetches all KPIs (waitlistSize, day1Revenue, day7Revenue, influencerRevenue, reviews30d) in parallel using Promise.all

checklist.name: Analytics metric set
checklist.description: getLaunchMetrics returns all five metrics: waitlistSize, day1Revenue, day7Revenue, influencerRevenue, and reviews30d

checklist.name: Plain-text launch email
checklist.description: pre-launch-checklist.md mentions using a plain-text email template for the launch email to avoid the promotions/spam folder

checklist.name: Domain warm-up timing
checklist.description: pre-launch-checklist.md mentions warming up the sending domain at least 2 weeks before launch

checklist.name: Dedicated IP and off-peak send
checklist.description: pre-launch-checklist.md mentions using a dedicated IP and scheduling the launch email send during off-peak hours (6-8am) and/or staggering large lists

checklist.name: Staggered review requests
checklist.description: Code or checklist mentions staggering review request emails to prevent all reviews arriving on the same day
